languages.text: "Побочные эффекты: поражение зрительного нерва, нарушение сердечного ритма, кома... " {n}Эоганн как бы невзначай перечисляет возможные последствия.{/n} "Мы с Нунциусом подготовим реанимационные ритуалы. Полагаю, после принятия данной субстанции вас ожидает незабываемый трансцендентный опыт".

"Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."
languages.original_text: "Побочные эффекты: поражение зрительного нерва, нарушение сердечного ритма, кома... " {n}Эоганн как бы невзначай перечисляет возможные последствия.{/n} "Мы с Нунциусом подготовим реанимационные ритуалы. Полагаю, после принятия данной субстанции вас ожидает незабываемый трансцендентный опыт".

traits.locale_text: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

"Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

"Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

"Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

languages.text: «Efectos secundarios: daños en el nervio óptico, disrupción del ritmo cardíaco, coma...». {n}Eogunn enumera la lista de posibles consecuencias.{/n} «Nuncius y yo prepararemos los rituales de reanimación. Creo que al ingerir esta sustancia vivirá una experiencia trascendental e inolvidable».
languages.original_text: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

traits.locale_text: «Efectos secundarios: daños en el nervio óptico, disrupción del ritmo cardíaco, coma...». {n}Eogunn enumera la lista de posibles consecuencias.{/n} «Nuncius y yo prepararemos los rituales de reanimación. Creo que al ingerir esta sustancia vivirá una experiencia trascendental e inolvidable».

languages.text: “副作用包括：视神经损伤、心律失常、昏迷……”{n}伊奥贡漫不经心地列举着后果。{/n}“我和努恩修斯会准备复生仪式。我相信，摄入这种物质会带来一场令人终生难忘的超凡体验。”
languages.original_text: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

traits.locale_text: “副作用包括：视神经损伤、心律失常、昏迷……”{n}伊奥贡漫不经心地列举着后果。{/n}“我和努恩修斯会准备复生仪式。我相信，摄入这种物质会带来一场令人终生难忘的超凡体验。”

languages.text: "Nebenwirkungen: Optischer Nervenschaden, Herzrhythmusstörungen, Koma ..." {n}Eogunn listet kurz die möglichen Konsequenzen auf.{/n} "Nuncius und ich werden die Reanimationsrituale vorbereiten. Ich glaube, nach dem Verzehr dieser Substanz erwartet Euch ein unvergessliches transzendentales Erlebnis."
languages.original_text: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

traits.locale_text: "Nebenwirkungen: Optischer Nervenschaden, Herzrhythmusstörungen, Koma ..." {n}Eogunn listet kurz die möglichen Konsequenzen auf.{/n} "Nuncius und ich werden die Reanimationsrituale vorbereiten. Ich glaube, nach dem Verzehr dieser Substanz erwartet Euch ein unvergessliches transzendentales Erlebnis."

languages.text: « Effets secondaires : lésions des nerfs optiques, arythmie cardiaque, coma... » {n}Eogunn égrène la liste des conséquences potentielles avec désinvolture.{/n} « Nuncius et moi allons préparer les rituels de réanimation. Gageons que la consommation de cette substance vous réserve une expérience transcendante inoubliable. »
languages.original_text: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

traits.locale_text: « Effets secondaires : lésions des nerfs optiques, arythmie cardiaque, coma... » {n}Eogunn égrène la liste des conséquences potentielles avec désinvolture.{/n} « Nuncius et moi allons préparer les rituels de réanimation. Gageons que la consommation de cette substance vous réserve une expérience transcendante inoubliable. »

languages.text: "Yan etkiler: Optik sinir hasarı, kalp ritmi bozukluğu, koma..." {n}Eogunn, olası sonuçları umursamazca sıralıyor.{/n} "Nuncius ve ben hayata döndürme ayinlerini hazırlayacağız. İnanıyorum ki bu maddeyi tükettikten sonra sizi unutulmaz, aşkın bir deneyim bekliyor."
languages.original_text: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."

traits.locale_text: "Yan etkiler: Optik sinir hasarı, kalp ritmi bozukluğu, koma..." {n}Eogunn, olası sonuçları umursamazca sıralıyor.{/n} "Nuncius ve ben hayata döndürme ayinlerini hazırlayacağız. İnanıyorum ki bu maddeyi tükettikten sonra sizi unutulmaz, aşkın bir deneyim bekliyor."

languages.text: 「副作用：視神経損傷、心拍リズムの乱れ、昏睡…」{n}エオグンは、その潜在的な影響を軽口で列挙する。{/n}「ヌンシウスと私が蘇生儀式を準備します。この物質を摂取すれば、忘れられない超越的な体験が待っているでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."
